subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Victoria in Ramleh, 1912-03-05
subcodes.first_line: The sacred Manifestations of God were each, in the world of existence, even as a sun in its utmost splendor, each in its time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظاهر مقدسه الهیه هر یک عالم امکان را شمسی در نهایت اشراق بودند هر یک وقت
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @fewness of numbers not regarded in teaching the Cause, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
